steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The question asks for the output when the input is $3$, so replace $x$ with $3$ in the function.

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: $$ f(3)=18(3)+22 $$ $$ f(3)=54+22 $$ $$ f(3)=76 $$ This is the requested function value. The answer is C.
